##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of sharp yellow blocky crystals

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated. Measured a and b cell edges are actually twice as big as reported.
